justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the Tuesday of next week at 15h" as June 9th at 15:00 and then correctly understood "a day or two later next week" to find an appointment on June 11th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully proposed a close alternative (Thursday instead of Tuesday) at the same time after the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the request in three turns, accurately processing information and offering a suitable alternative without unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's needs and offering a viable solution.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search to find an alternative appointment after the initial request was unavailable.
